RT Harsh Jaiswal: Re After configuring CAS on my instance, and trust me, this was the toughest part of the journey. Once done, Claude forged a JWT, PO...
entries.summary: RT Harsh Jaiswal Re After configuring CAS on my instance, and trust me, this was the toughest part of the journey. Once done, Claude forged a JWT, POSTs it to /SAML20/SP/ACS, and gets a session cookie/tokens which can be used to connect to the VPN. It was game over. Your private network was public. If you're running CAS-enabled PAN-OS, update the appliance immediately.

entries.summary: Sometimes it seems security is drifting back towards a "Prevent Breach" mindset. Prevent breach was never enough. Patch faster, of course. But offensive AI is about a lot more than finding bugs! Invest in Assume Breach! Grow an internal Red Team. Automate offensive AI. entries.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry

entries.title: RT GitHub: We are investigating unauthorized access to GitHub’s internal repositories. While we currently have no evidence of impact to customer info...
entries.summary: RT GitHub We are investigating unauthorized access to GitHub’s internal repositories. While we currently have no evidence of impact to customer information stored outside of GitHub’s internal repositories (such as our customers’ enterprises, organizations, and repositories), we are closely monitoring our infrastructure for follow-on activity.

entries.title: .@obsdmd asked us to audit their Sync protocol. Our engineers delivered eleven findings. Five went above and beyond the original scope and found syste...
entries.summary: .@obsdmd asked us to audit their Sync protocol. Our engineers delivered eleven findings. Five went above and beyond the original scope and found system-level issues that weren't specific to Sync itself. We see this pattern often with our clients. We respect scope as a delivery contract, but we have a professional obligation to surface what our engineers see. Anything they catch is flagged, and the

entries.title: RT Eugene Yan: Cloudflare on their vulnerabilty discovery harness • Recon: Read the codebase, return an architecture doc • Hunt: ~50 agents look for...
entries.summary: RT Eugene Yan Cloudflare on their vulnerabilty discovery harness • Recon: Read the codebase, return an architecture doc • Hunt: ~50 agents look for bugs concurrently • Validate: Independent agents try to disprove findings • Gapfill: Areas that need a 2nd pass are flagged • Dedup: Findings with the same root cause combined • Trace: Confirms if attacker input reaches the bug • Feedback: If reachable
